body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Body-energy** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Body-energy — interoception, heart-brain axis, breathing entrainment, spiritus.
**Phase context:** Interoception as spiritus — visceral perception, cardiac interoception, felt aliveness.

**Altered spatiotemporal brain dynamics of interoception in behavioural-variant frontotemporal dementia.** — EBioMedicine (2025). DOI: 10.1016/j.ebiom.2025.105614. PMID: 39987747. BACKGROUND: Dysfunctional allostatic-interoception, altered processing of bodily signals in response to environmental demands, occurs in behavioural-variant frontotemporal dementia (bvFTD) patients. Previous research has not investigated the dynamic nature of interoception using methods like intrinsic neural timescales.
